description: This file defines a linked list data structure with methods to add, remove, retrieve size, and access elements by index. The class 'LinkedList' manages nodes with string data and provides internal methods for node management.

classes.name: LinkedList
classes.description: A singly linked list implementation managing nodes containing strings, with methods for adding, removing, size calculation, and element retrieval.

classes.name: Node
classes.description: An internal class representing a node in the linked list, holding string data and a reference to the next node.

methods.name: add
methods.description: Adds a new element to the end of the linked list.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Removes the first occurrence of the specified element from the list.

methods.name: size
methods.description: Returns the number of elements in the list.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Retrieves the element at the specified index.

methods.name: unlink
methods.description: Internal method to unlink a node from the list.

methods.name: tail
methods.description: Internal method to find the last node in the list.
